when_to_use: Deep JavaScript and React courses for senior devs
Team subscription for frontend skill development
Expert-taught CSS architecture for design system teams
Performance optimization courses for web engineers

cons: No interactive code sandbox per course
review.verdict: Worth the subscription for serious web devs—few platforms match the instructor depth.
review.best_for: Mid-to-senior frontend engineers deepening JavaScript and CSS expertise
review.not_for: Beginners or backend-focused devs—cost won't pay back

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription; downgradable next cycle, no explicit peak-lock.
